summary: Gamification & content expansion testing complete. Backend: 31/31 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All gamification features working (streak card, trophies, share buttons, sources, preview cards). 98 facts seeded (96+ required). AI generation working (~10s). Trophy system fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All new gamification features implemented correctly
✅ GET /api/preview returns 20 category preview cards with sample_title/sample_short/image_url
✅ GET /api/trophies returns 10 trophies with earned flag (requires auth)
✅ POST /api/auth/checkin creates streak=1 on first call, returns earned trophies
✅ POST /api/auth/checkin same day doesn't change streak
✅ Facts include optional 'sources' field (list of {title, url})
✅ POST /api/facts/{id}/react returns new_trophies array
✅ POST /api/facts/{id}/bookmark returns new_trophies array (collector trophy at 10 bookmarks)
✅ POST /api/facts/generate tracks ai_generated_count (ai_pioneer trophy at 5)
✅ POST /api/facts/bulk-generate creates multiple AI facts (tested with count=1, took ~11s)
✅ DB has 98 facts after startup (96+ required)
✅ Frontend: Onboarding shows 20 preview cards with images and sample facts (testID chip-{Category})
✅ Frontend: Profile shows streak card (testID streak-card) with fire emoji 🔥 and days
✅ Frontend: Profile shows trophies grid (10 trophies, testID trophy-{id}) with earned/locked states
✅ Frontend: Profile has share-profile button (testID share-profile)
✅ Frontend: Feed cards have share-{id} button in side actions
✅ Frontend: Detail view has detail-share button (testID detail-share)
✅ Frontend: Detail view shows FONTI section with sources when present (testID source-{idx})
✅ Trophy modal component exists (TrophyModal.tsx) with testID trophy-modal
✅ Trophy modal appears on first checkin via tabs/_layout.tsx
✅ All testIDs correctly implemented for testing
✅ Share functionality uses native Share API (limited on web, works on mobile)
✅ Sources field properly structured with title and url
✅ Streak tracking working correctly (same-day checkin doesn't increment)
✅ Trophy earning logic working (first_step, curious, scholar, collector, ai_pioneer, etc.)
✅ AI generation count tracking working
✅ Bulk generation working (tested with count=1 for speed)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest: TEST_streak_*, TEST_react_*, TEST_bookmark_*, TEST_ai_*, TEST_bulk_*. Existing test@test.com user has 72 seen facts, 3 liked, 1 bookmarked, streak=1, 3 trophies earned (Primo passo, Curioso, Studioso).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gamification features fully functional. Backend API tested with pytest (31/31 passed). Frontend tested with Playwright (all flows working). Streak system working correctly (same-day checkin doesn't increment). Trophy system working (10 trophies: first_step, curious, scholar, encyclopedia, collector, flame_3, flame_7, flame_30, explorer, ai_pioneer). Sources field working (some facts have sources, some don't - as expected). Preview endpoint working (20 categories with sample facts and images). Share buttons present on feed, detail, and profile. AI generation working (~10s per fact). Bulk generation working (~11s for 1 fact). No issues found. App ready for production.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. All gamification features working as designed.
